entries.title: import
entries.description: Imports a module
Pipeline operator for chaining function calls
Addition operator. Also concatenates strings (with auto-conversion of non-string operands).
Subtraction operator.
Multiplication operator.
Division operator. Returns a Float when dividing integers.
Modulo operator. Returns the remainder of a division.
Equality comparison. Returns true when both operands are equal.
Inequality comparison. Returns true when the operands differ.
Less-than comparison.
Less-than-or-equal comparison.
Greater-than comparison.
Greater-than-or-equal comparison.
Logical AND. Returns true when both operands are truthy. Short-circuits when the left operand is falsy.
Logical OR. Returns true when at least one operand is truthy. Short-circuits when the left operand is truthy.
Logical NOT. Negates a boolean expression.
Null coalescing operator. Returns the right-hand value when the left-hand side is null.
Safe navigation operator. Accesses a property or calls a method only when the receiver is not null; otherwise returns null.
Range operator. Creates an array of integers from start to end (exclusive).
Add and assign. Equivalent to a = a + b. Also concatenates strings.
Subtract and assign. Equivalent to a = a - b.
Multiply and assign. Equivalent to a = a * b.
Divide and assign. Equivalent to a = a / b.
Modulo and assign. Equivalent to a = a % b.
Conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently falsy (null or false). Right-hand side is not evaluated when skipped.
Conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently truthy. Right-hand side is not evaluated when skipped.
Nullish conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently null. Preserves false and 0.
Postfix increment. Increases a variable by 1 and returns the value before incrementing.
Postfix decrement. Decreases a variable by 1 and returns the value before decrementing.

entries.title: respond_to
